spec_match.rationale: Intercepts `beforeinput` on a contenteditable, reads every file from `dataTransfer.items`, calls `preventDefault()`, and lifts accepted IME media into attachment chips.

interactive.rationale: Editable composer, attachment chips with remove buttons, live event log, working post button — a realistic UI, not a static card.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Promises a Twitter/Bluesky-style chip UI and a beforeinput/input event log; both render, with simulator buttons for the IME-specific branches.

edge_cases.rationale: The simulator now exercises a three-file commit, unsupported video/mp4 rejection, a 30 MB image rejection, and text/plain fallback alt text on accepted chips.

design_system.rationale: All colours come from CSS variables, button background overrides pair with explicit text colours, and the attachment remove icon button has an accessible label.

summary: The comment-composer now covers the realistic social-app happy path plus the important IME edge cases: bulk sticker commits, unsupported MIME rejection, size-limit rejection, and accessible text/plain fallback exposure.
